name: kiro-update-checker
description: Automatically checks the official Kiro downloads page for new IDE releases. Intended for users running Kiro in Administrator mode, where the built-in update feature may not be available.

kiroUpdateChecker.checkInterval.description: Interval in minutes to check for updates. Set to 0 to disable automatic checks.

kiroUpdateChecker.enableOnStartup.description: Whether to check for updates on startup.

kiroUpdateChecker.autoDownload.description: Whether to automatically download and install new versions.

kiroUpdateChecker.downloadFolder.description: Custom folder to download updates to. Leave empty to use the default Downloads folder.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
